# Avoimempi Eduskunta â€” Server Package

> Bun HTTP server exposing Finnish Parliament data through a typed REST API. Uses a readonly SQLite database, domain-specific repository classes, in-memory response caching, and security headers middleware.

## Entry Point

`index.ts` â€” Initializes the database connection, instantiates all repositories, configures the response cache, registers all route groups, and starts `Bun.serve()`.

## Database Layer (`database/`)

### Connection (`database/db.ts`)
- `DatabaseConnection` class â€” opens the main SQLite database in **readonly** mode
- Pragmas: `query_only=ON`, `temp_store=memory`, `cache_size=64MB`, `mmap_size=30GB`
- Path from `getDatabasePath()` in `packages/shared/database`

### Query Helpers (`database/query-helpers.ts`)
- `buildSearchQuery(raw)` â€” tokenizes search string with `%` separators
- `buildFtsSearchQuery(raw)` â€” FTS-style `"token"*` query
- `endDateExclusive(date)` â€” converts inclusive end date to exclusive upper bound
- `buildDocumentIdentifierVariants(id)` â€” generates 3 matching variants for a document identifier
- `paginatedResult(items, total, page, limit)` â€” wraps paginated data with metadata

### SQL Files (`database/queries/`)
153 parameterized `.sql` files organized by domain. Repositories load these as strings and prepare typed statements with `db.prepare<RowType, ParamType>(sql)`.

### Startup (`database/launch-db.ts`)
Supports 3 modes: `local` (use local DB), `latest` (download from storage manifest), `storage-key` (explicit key). Handles WAL sidecar cleanup and optional trace DB download.

## Repositories (`database/repositories/`)

All repositories receive the `db` instance and expose typed async query methods.

### PersonRepository
`fetchRepresentativePage`, `fetchPersonSearch(q, limit?, date?)`, `fetchPersonGroupMemberships`, `fetchPersonTerms`, `fetchPersonVotes`, `fetchRepresentativeDetails`, `fetchRepresentativeDistricts`, `fetchLeavingParliamentRecords`, `fetchTrustPositions`, `fetchGovernmentMemberships`, `fetchGovernmentPeriods`, `fetchPersonSpeeches(personId, limit?, offset?)`, `fetchPersonQuestions(personId, limit?)`, `fetchPersonCommittees`, `fetchPersonDissents(personId, limit?)`

### VotingRepository
`fetchVotingOverview(startDate?, endDate?)`, `queryVotings(q, ...)`, `browseVotings(q?, phase?, session?, sort?, startDate?, endDate?, limit?)`, `fetchRecentVotings`, `fetchVotingById`, `fetchVotingInlineDetails(id)` (party breakdown + member votes + gov/opposition), `fetchVotingsByDocument(identifier)`, `fetchDocumentRelations(identifier)`

### SessionRepository
`fetchSessions(page, limit)`, `fetchSectionByKey(sectionKey)`, `fetchSectionSpeeches(sectionKey, limit, offset)`, `fetchSectionVotings`, `fetchSectionSubSections`, `fetchSectionRollCall`, `fetchSessionByDate`, `fetchSessionWithSectionsByDate`, `fetchSpeechesByDate`, `fetchSessionDates`, `fetchCompletedSessionDates`, `fetchSectionDocumentLinks`, `fetchLatestSpeechDate`, `fetchSessionNotices`

### HomeRepository
Aggregates session and analytics data. `fetchOverview(params)` â€” returns scope, freshness timestamps, party composition, latest day activities, and analytics signals (close votes, speech activity, coalition/opposition).

### AnalyticsRepository
`fetchVotingParticipation`, `fetchVotingParticipationByGovernment(personId, ...)`, `fetchGenderDivisionOverTime`, `fetchAgeDivisionOverTime`, `fetchAttendanceByParty`, `fetchAttendancePerPerson`, `fetchCloseVotes(threshold, limit, ...)`, `fetchCoalitionVsOpposition`, `fetchRecentActivity`, `fetchSpeechActivity`, `fetchPartySummary(asOfDate?, startDate?, endDate?, governmentName?, governmentStartDate?)`, `fetchPartyMembers(partyCode, ...)`, `fetchPartyDiscipline`

### DocumentRepository (largest â€” 1,868 lines)
One method group per document type: `WrittenQuestion`, `ExpertStatement`, `CommitteeReport`, `Interpellation`, `ParliamentAnswer`, `GovernmentProposal`, `LegislativeInitiative`, `OralQuestion`. Each group has: `fetch*List/Count`, `fetch*ById/ByIdentifier`, `fetch*Subjects/Years`, plus related data (signers, sessions, stages, laws). Also: `federatedSearch(q, limit)`.

### MetadataRepository
`fetchParliamentComposition(date)`, `fetchGovernments`, `fetchGovernmentByDate`, `fetchGovernmentMembers(id)`, `fetchHallituskaudet`

### ImportSourceRepository
Reads from the trace database (`avoimempi-eduskunta-trace.db`). `fetchRowTrace(table, pkName, pkValue)` â€” returns scrape and migration timestamps. `fetchImportSourceTableSummaries(tableNames)` â€” per-table import statistics.

## Routes (`routes/`)

All route groups are wrapped with `withSecurityHeaders`. API routes are also wrapped by the response cache.

### Core Routes (`core-routes.ts`)
```
GET /api/health
GET /api/ready                          (excluded from cache)
GET /api/import-source/row-trace        ?table=&pkName=&pkValue=
GET /api/import-source/table-summaries  ?tableNames=...
GET /api/composition/:date
GET /api/hallituskaudet
GET /api/db-info
GET /api/version
GET /api/changes-report                 ?runId=
GET /api/changes-history
```

### Person Routes (`person-routes.ts`)
```
GET /api/person/search                  ?q= (min 2 chars)
GET /api/person/:id/group-memberships
GET /api/person/:id/terms
GET /api/person/:id/votes
GET /api/person/:id/details
GET /api/person/:id/districts
GET /api/person/:id/leaving-records
GET /api/person/:id/trust-positions
GET /api/person/:id/government-memberships
GET /api/person/:id/government-periods
GET /api/person/:id/speeches            ?limit=50&offset=0 (max 500)
GET /api/person/:id/questions           ?limit=500 (max 2000)
GET /api/person/:id/committees
GET /api/person/:id/dissents            ?limit=100 (max 1000)
```

### Voting Routes (`voting-routes.ts`)
```
GET /api/votings/recent                 ?startDate=&endDate=
GET /api/votings/overview               ?startDate=&endDate=
GET /api/votings/search                 ?q= (min 3 chars)
GET /api/votings/browse                 ?q=&phase=&session=&sort=newest|oldest|closest|largest&startDate=&endDate=
GET /api/votings/by-document/:identifier
GET /api/documents/:identifier/relations
GET /api/votings/:id
GET /api/votings/:id/details
```

### Session Routes (`session-routes.ts`)
```
GET /api/sessions                       ?page=1&limit=20 (max 200)
GET /api/sections/:sectionKey
GET /api/sections/:sectionKey/speeches  ?limit=20&offset=0 (max 500)
GET /api/sections/:sectionKey/votings
GET /api/sections/:sectionKey/subsections
GET /api/sections/:sectionKey/roll-call
GET /api/sections/:sectionKey/links
GET /api/day/:date/session
GET /api/day/:date/sessions
GET /api/day/:date/speeches
GET /api/session-dates
GET /api/session-dates/completed
```

### Party Routes (`party-routes.ts`)
```
GET /api/parties/summary                ?asOfDate=&startDate=&endDate=&governmentName=&governmentStartDate=
GET /api/parties/:code/members          ?asOfDate=...
```

### Home Routes (`home-routes.ts`)
```
GET /api/home/overview                  ?asOfDate=&startDate=&endDate=&governmentName=&governmentStartDate=
```

### Government Routes (`government-routes.ts`)
```
GET /api/hallitukset
GET /api/hallitukset/active             ?date=YYYY-MM-DD
GET /api/hallitukset/:id/members
```

### Analytics Routes (`insight-analytics-routes.ts`)
```
GET /api/insights/participation         ?startDate=&endDate=
GET /api/insights/participation/:personId/by-government
GET /api/insights/gender-division
GET /api/insights/age-division
GET /api/insights/attendance-by-party   ?startDate=&endDate=
GET /api/insights/attendance-per-person ?startDate=&endDate=
GET /api/insights/close-votes           ?threshold=&limit=&startDate=&endDate=
GET /api/insights/coalition-opposition  ?limit=&startDate=&endDate=
GET /api/insights/speech-activity       ?limit=&startDate=&endDate=
GET /api/insights/party-discipline      ?startDate=&endDate=
GET /api/insights/recent-activity       ?limit=&startDate=&endDate=
```

### Document Routes (`document-routes.ts` + subdirectories)
```
GET /api/search                         ?q= (min 2 chars, limit 30-200) â€” federated across all doc types
GET /api/interpellations                (list, search, by-id, by-identifier, subjects, years, stages, sessions, signers)
GET /api/written-questions              (same structure)
GET /api/expert-statements              (same structure)
GET /api/oral-questions                 (same structure)
GET /api/committee-reports              (same structure + source/recipient committees)
GET /api/legislative-initiatives        (same structure)
GET /api/parliament-answers             (same structure)
GET /api/government-proposals           (same structure)
```

### Static Page Routes (`static-page-routes.ts`)
Serves the React SPA HTML bundle for all client-side routes:
`/`, `/edustajat`, `/puolueet`, `/istunnot`, `/aanestykset`, `/asiakirjat`, `/analytiikka`, `/hallitukset`, `/muutokset`, `/laadunvalvonta`

## Middleware (`middleware/`)

### Security Headers (`middleware/security-headers.ts`)
Applied to all routes via `withSecurityHeaders()`. Sets: `X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff`, `X-Frame-Options: DENY`, `Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin`, `Content-Security-Policy` (self-only, unsafe-inline for styles/fonts).

## HTTP Utilities (`routes/http.ts`)

- `getSearchParams(req)` â€” extract `URLSearchParams`
- `getOptionalQueryParam(params, key)` â€” string or undefined
- `getIntegerQueryParam(params, key, fallback)` â€” parse integer
- `getBoundedIntegerQueryParam(params, key, min, max, fallback)` â€” bounded integer
- `getPageLimitQueryParams(params, maxLimit)` â€” validated `{ page, limit }`
- `getLimitOffsetQueryParams(params, maxLimit)` â€” validated `{ limit, offset }`
- `validateDateRange(startDate?, endDate?)` â€” validates ISO date format

## Route Response Helpers (`routes/route-responses.ts`)

- `json(data, init?)` â€” typed JSON response
- `badRequest(message)` â€” 400
- `notFound(message?)` â€” 404
- `jsonOrNotFound(data, message?)` â€” data or 404

## Response Cache (`cache/response-cache.ts`)

- In-memory, keyed by URL (pathname + query string)
- TTL: 5 minutes
- Max entries: 2000
- Generation key: migration timestamp (disabled in dev, invalidates cache on new data)
- Caches 2xx and 4xx; never 5xx
- `cache.wrapRoutes(routes, { exclude? })` â€” wraps route handlers transparently
